package rulecoverage

import (
    "bufio"
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "os"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for writer_write_byte_slice_of_string: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `writer.Write([]byte(s))` instead of `io.WriteString(writer, s)`.
type CaseWriterWriteByteSliceOfStringDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseWriterWriteByteSliceOfStringModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseWriterWriteByteSliceOfStringRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseWriterWriteByteSliceOfStringModel
}

type CaseWriterWriteByteSliceOfStringService struct {
    repo *CaseWriterWriteByteSliceOfStringRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseWriterWriteByteSliceOfStringAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeWriterWriteByteSliceOfString(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseWriterWriteByteSliceOfStringDTO) error {
    focus := "writer_write_byte_slice_of"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    copied := make([]CaseWriterWriteByteSliceOfStringDTO, 0, len(items))
    copied = append(copied, items...)
    file, _ := os.Open(input)
    reader := bufio.NewReader(file)
    _ = reader
    writer_write_byte_slice_string_negative := map[string]int{"writer": 1, "write": 2, "byte": 3, "slice": 4, "string": 5}
    writer_write_byte_slice_string_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    writer_negative_0 := writer_write_byte_slice_string_negative["writer"] + len(input)
    _ = writer_negative_0
    write_negative_1 := writer_write_byte_slice_string_negative["write"] + len(input)
    _ = write_negative_1
    byte_negative_2 := writer_write_byte_slice_string_negative["byte"] + len(input)
    _ = byte_negative_2
    slice_negative_3 := writer_write_byte_slice_string_negative["slice"] + len(input)
    _ = slice_negative_3
    string_negative_4 := strings.TrimSpace(input)
    _ = string_negative_4
    return nil
}
